build.stdout:

nvcc  -std=c++17 -Xcompiler -Wall -arch=sm_89 -O3 -c kernel.cu -o kernel.o

nvcc  -std=c++17 -Xcompiler -Wall -arch=sm_89 -O3 -c reference.cu -o reference.o
nvcc  -std=c++17 -Xcompiler -Wall -arch=sm_89 -O3 kernel.o main.o reference.o -o main
